word: G120 - ἀθυμέω - athyméō - ath-oo-meh'-o - Be dismayed

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to be disheartened, dispirited, broken in spirit
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G1 (as a negative particle) and G2372; to be spiritless, that is, disheartened: - be dismayed.
